lines.en_lit: Rabbi Yehuda, Rabbi Yosei, and Rabbi Shimon prohibit Apparently, there is no clarification.

From where Perhaps it is different there, as the reason is taught: said to Rabbi Meir: Do you not concede the jug might split open And he be found drinking untithed retroactively. And he said to them: if it splits open,
Rather, from Ayo taught. As Ayo taught Rabbi Yehuda says: A person cannot stipulate conditions about two matters at once,
Rather, if the Sage comes to the east, his eiruv is to the east, to the west, his eiruv is to the west. However, not from here, and from there,
And we discussed What is different from here and from there not that there is no clarification,
to the east and the west also there is no clarification.
And Rabbi Yoḥanan said: as the Sage had already come
And now that we have said according to Rabbi Yehuda there is no clarification, he is of writing, Yom Kippur as well, let us place two and write on them
due to the High Priest’s weakness. not on his mind; As, if you do not say so, without writing also this is large and this is small.

And if you say he does not collect all didn’t Rav Yehuda say: One who slaughters must receive all of the blood of bull, as it is stated: “And all the blood of the bull he shall pour out on the base of the altar”
And if you say perhaps some of might spill, this white and this is red Rather, due to the High Priest’s weakness, not on his mind. Here, too, due to the High Priest’s weakness not on his mind.
A certain person descended before Rava he recited: emerged and placed on the second golden pedestal in the Sanctuary; he took the blood of the bull and placed the blood of the goat
said to him: one in accordance with the Rabbis, and one in accordance with Rabbi Yehuda. Rather, recite He placed the blood of the goat and took the blood of the bull

And sprinkled from on the curtain opposite the Ark from outside The Sages taught: and so shall he do for the Tent of Meeting What the verse states Just as he sprinkles in the innermost sanctum, so he sprinkles in the Sanctuary,

Just as the innermost sanctum once upward and seven downward from the blood of the bull, so he sprinkles in the Sanctuary. And just as the innermost sanctum once upward and seven downward from the blood of the goat, so he sprinkles in the Sanctuary. “That dwells with them in the midst of their impurity,” even when are impure, the Divine Presence is with them.
A certain Sadducee said to Rabbi Ḥanina:
